query:
SELECT p.id, p.codigo, p.descricao, p.valorTotal, p.valorGlosado, p.motivoGlosa, a.nome as arquivo, c.nome as convenio
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id
WHERE c.nome LIKE '%unimed%' OR a.nome LIKE '%unimed%' OR a.nome LIKE '%0278119%'
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT p.id, p.codigo, p.descricao, p.valorTotal, p.valorGlosado, p.motivoGlosa, a.nome as arquivo, c.nome as convenio
FROM procedimentos p
JOIN arquivos a ON p.arquivoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id
WHERE c.nome LIKE '%unimed%' OR a.nome LIKE '%unimed%' OR a.nome LIKE '%0278119%'
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
